title: cephalaria scabra
intro: Cephalaria scabra, also known as hairy pellitory or scabrous cephalaria, is a plant species in the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as sore throats, bronchitis, and skin infections. The medicinal properties of Cephalaria scabra are attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid content, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory activities. Herbal preparations of Cephalaria scabra can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
